block_00: How to trade with the ZigZag indicator?
block_01: Recognizing the trend among the price noise is absolutely crucial for any trader. This tool looks extremely simple, but it has the power to filter out the short-term fluctuations of the price, revealing the bigger picture.
block_02: By setting a certain percentage for the indicator, you are able to exclude price movements below this value and receive a smoother indication of the price direction.
block_03: The ZigZag is a great complementary tool that can be combined with many indicators to achieve more precise predictions and better entries and exits for deals.
block_04: Read on to learn how to include this indicator into your routine.
